# infomaniak_public_cloud_project (Data Source)

Reads a Public Cloud project by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "infomaniak_public_cloud_project" "this" {
  public_cloud_id = 1234
  id              = 5678
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Identifier of the project.
- `public_cloud_id` (Number) Identifier of the parent Public Cloud product.

### Read-Only

- `billing_end_at` (Number) End of the current billing window.
- `billing_start_at` (Number) Start of the current billing window.
- `created_at` (Number) Creation timestamp (Unix seconds).
- `name` (String) Project name.
- `open_stack_name` (String) Underlying OpenStack tenant name.
- `price` (Number) Current cumulative cost of the project.
- `price_updated_at` (Number) Last time the price was recomputed.
- `resource_level` (Number) Resource-level limit of the project.
- `status` (String) Lifecycle status (`creating`, `ok`, `error`, …).
- `updated_at` (Number) Last update timestamp (Unix seconds).
- `user_count` (Number) Total number of users in the project.
